scope: zero-training focus-time localization of whether the negative quotient-Tweedie result is caused by sharing the clean-oracle carrier coefficient or by an insufficient topology-to-vector representation

carrier.fit_policy: each listed readout is fitted by closed-form ridge on the fixed train panel and evaluated once on the disjoint validation panel

decision_rule.tweedie_specific_passes: shared clean-oracle coefficient mismatch is sufficient; qualify a separately trained calibrated Tweedie carrier
decision_rule.noisy_plus_tweedie_passes: a dual-state linear conversion is sufficient; qualify only that bounded conversion
decision_rule.probe_variant_passes: hidden topology is usable but scalar Tweedie topology is insufficient; qualify a narrowly time-gated learned latent-pair vector field
decision_rule.all_nonoracle_fail: the scalar topology-carrier hypothesis is rejected; do not implement ACF/self-conditioning and move to probability-path conditional variance
decision_rule.boundary: This is a closed-form read-only localization. It adds no neural optimizer step, production branch, exposure, seed, sampler search, H1b-H6, tensor condition, oracle, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
